_**User (2026-04-16 13:40:58Z)**_

Where to find all CoPilot chat conversations file in Windows Explorer?

---

_**Agent (copilot/gpt-4.1)**_

To find all GitHub Copilot Chat conversation files in Windows Explorer, look in the following location:

```
%APPDATA%\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat
```

You can paste this path into the Windows Explorer address bar. Conversation files are typically stored as `.json` files in this folder.
